message:
chore(node): regenerate verification evidence and contract check artifacts

Automated regeneration of verification_evidence.json files across
sections 10.4, 10.9, 10.13, 10.14, 10.18, and bootstrap after code
changes to VEF, idempotency, remote bulkhead, and epoch transition
subsystems. Includes updated check reports, config resolution logs,
and contract checks reflecting current implementation state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
